mapper.select: SELECT a.approval_id, a.type_id, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.title, a.content, a.applicant_id, a.approver_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept, t.type_name,s.status_name FROM approval a JOIN employee e ON a.applicant_id = e.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s ON a.status_id = s.status_id WHERE a.applicant_id={#applicantId}

SELECT c.approval_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM approval c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE c.applicant_id = #{applicantId}
SELECT c.approval_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM approval c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE e.dept = #{dept}

SELECT c.approval_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM approval c LEFT JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE c.approval_id = #{approvalId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval(start_date, end_date, title, content, applicant_id) VALUES (#{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{title}, #{content}, #{applicantId})
